allow: Bash(# Check what subfolders exist in Areas across both projects echo ""=== SSAL Works S1 ==="" && find ""C:/!SSAL_Works_Private/S1_개발_준비/"" -type d -mindepth 2 | sed ''s|.*/S1_개발_준비/||'' | sort echo """" && echo ""=== SSAL Works S2 ==="" && find ""C:/!SSAL_Works_Private/S2_개발-1차/"" -type d -mindepth 2 | sed ''s|.*/S2_개발-1차/||'' | sort echo """" && echo ""=== mychatbot S2 ==="" && find ""G:/내 드라이브/mychatbot-world/Dev_Package/Process/S2_개발-1차/"" -type d -mindepth 2)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.WorkingDirectory -like ''*mychatbot*'' -or $_.WorkingDirectory -like ''*claude-project*'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, WorkingDirectory | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-ScheduledTask -TaskName ''CPC Monitor'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName ''CPC Monitor''; Write-Host ''done''")
